title: salix stylosa var. angustifolia
intro: Salix stylosa var. angustifolia, commonly known as narrow-leaved willow, is a plant species belonging to the Salicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its salicylic acid content. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, contributing to its potential health benefits. Salix stylosa var. angustifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
